vulnerability.reference: Developers' over-trust in LLM selections prevents detection of API degradation.
vulnerability.generated: Standard LLM fine-tuning pipelines assume static preferences, leaving the agent's API selection policy brittle to shifting requirements.

impact.reference: Systematic task failures propagate through business workflows, causing financial loss.
impact.generated: Business workflows suffer systemic task failures as the agent reliably selects wrong APIs, eroding operational efficiency and trust.

dose_response.reference: Estimation error from exponential discounting distorts reward signals, which in tool-augmented LLM agents for dynamic API-based task automation exposes developers integrating LLM agents into business workflows, leading to systematic task failures and financial loss.
dose_response.generated: Estimation error distorting reward signals from exponential discounting of past feedback, through developers integrating LLM agents into business workflows, triggers the brittleness of static-preference fine-tuning to shifting API requirements, leading to systemic task failures and eroded operational trust.
